summary: Frontend-only testing completed for ALMA Machines-Outils website. All pages load correctly with real machine photos and brand logos from Excel file. Navigation works properly. Responsive design adapts well to mobile.
seed_data_creation: None - all data is static in JSON files
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend pages tested successfully. Site uses static JSON data (brand_logos.json with 26 logos, machine_photos.json with 121 photos). No backend API - all data is embedded in frontend.

homepage.details: Hero video loads, bento grid displays correctly, navigation links work

partenaires_page.details: 26 brand logos displayed correctly from Excel data, grouped by category (Usinage, Tôlerie, Chaudronnerie)

brand_page_cmz.details: 5 CMZ machines displayed with 'Photo réelle' badges, real photos from Excel file

category_page_usinage.details: Machines displayed with real photos and 'Photo réelle' badges, brand filter links work

category_page_tolerie.details: 27 machines displayed, 24 with 'Photo réelle' badges, brands: HACO, PHENIX, KALTENBACH, KINGSLAND, TYRO

category_page_chaudronnerie.details: 12 machines displayed, 8 with 'Photo réelle' badges, brands: HACO, KALTENBACH, CINCINNATI, LOGITOWER

machine_detail_page.details: CMZ TA page shows real photo with 'Photo réelle' badge, breadcrumb navigation, technical specs, contact CTA

navigation.details: All navigation links work: Home -> Partenaires -> Brand -> Machine, breadcrumb navigation functional

responsive_mobile.details: Mobile hamburger menu works, pages adapt correctly to mobile viewport, brand cards stack vertically

data_verification.brand_logos: 26 logos loaded from brand_logos.json (CMZ, GEMINIS, ZMM, XYZ, TORNOS, HARTFORD, AKIRA, AXILE, SORALUCE, TOYODA, GER, DANOBAT, ONA, LASIT, SPALECK, EVERISING, UNITECH, WENZEL, HACO, PHENIX, IMET, KALTENBACH, CINCINNATI, KINGSLAND, TYRO, LOGITOWER)
data_verification.machine_photos: 121 photos loaded from machine_photos.json with real images from Excel file
